insights: Computational functionalism enables scientific study of AI consciousness — if right computations, AI can be conscious
16+ indicator properties from 5 theories (RPT, GWT, HOT, AST, PP) — operationalized for AI assessment
Most indicators CAN be implemented with current ML — no theoretical barriers to building conscious AI
No current AI system (LLMs, DeepMind agents, PaLM-E) is a strong consciousness candidate
Over-attributing consciousness creates 3 concrete risks: misallocation, inappropriate treatment, manipulation
GWT's limited-capacity workspace with global broadcast is key consciousness architecture
Higher-order theories require metacognitive monitoring — separate process from first-order perception
Agency + embodiment are necessary: goal-directed feedback + output-input contingency modeling
